title: blazewrit harness — Report step structured_output
description: Report = deliverable synthesis. The TERMINAL artifact of a NON-CODE flow (Review, Retro, Exploration, Spike, plan-standalone, Compound top-level summary). Synthesizes Investigate/Decide/Ground outputs into severity-tagged findings + action items, with an evidence trail. CODE flows (Feature/Bug/Refactor/Perf/Migration/Test/Chore/Release) have NO report step (README L60-62: failure_origin=report is invalid in code flows; Verify rejects). TARGET RUNTIME: grammar-constrained generation — M1 enforces SHAPE/enum/required/oneOf-branch at token-generation time; the model literally cannot emit a wrong shape. Fields needing TRUTH (evidence re-read, verify_probe re-execution, chain match, same-file parallel mutual-exclusion, count↔stdout derivation) are closed by SIBLING deterministic code checks listed in `x-m2-validator-contracts`, NOT by any keyword here. STORAGE §5: this output persists to Postgres step_runs jsonb; legacy '.blazewrit/reports/{id}.md' / '.blazewrit/plans/{id}-plan.md' paths are PRE-§5 and are DROPPED — there is no artifact_path field; cross-step refs are RowRefs.
$comment: report_type is the DISCRIMINANT. Common fields (summary/findings/action_items/based_on/declared_next_step) are required for every branch; the oneOf below tightens per-flow obligations (spike => verdict; plan_standalone => task_list; exploration relaxes the action-item floor; compound => sub_flow_summaries). based_on, declared_next_step, findings[].evidence_ref, findings[].verify_probe carry M2 validator contracts (truth, not shape).

report_type.description: DISCRIMINANT (README L26). Which non-code flow this report terminates. Drives the per-branch required obligations in the top-level oneOf. plan_standalone is the snake_case of legacy 'plan-standalone'.

summary.description: One-paragraph narrative synthesis: what was investigated/reviewed and the key conclusion (agent.md L21 'Summary'; README Activity 1 Synthesize). The deliverable's lede.

findings.description: Severity-tagged findings synthesized from Investigate/Review/Retro (README 'findings: [id, statement, severity, evidence_ref]'; agent.md L22-26 adds impact + verify_probe). Each finding carries: evidence_ref (SHAPE present here; 'claim verified'/evidence-traceable is the IRREDUCIBLE floor + M2 trace), source_tool provenance (R26 floor, REQUIRED), verify_probe (R20, re-executed by M2), and an unverified flag (R13 KEEP polarity — NOT forbidden). Empty array allowed (e.g. a clean review with no issues), but the reviewer spot-checks 2-3 against source.

action_items.description: Concrete next steps (README 'action_items: [description, priority, owner?, followup_flow_ref?]'; agent.md L27). README/agent require >=1 action item for every flow EXCEPT exploration (reviewer criterion 2 'except Exploration'). That per-flow floor is encoded in the top-level oneOf (exploration => minItems 0; all others => minItems 1). followup_flow_ref links a queued follow-up flow ROW (§5 RowRef, never a path) — realizes README Activity 3 'Action items — followup_flows 추출 (Decide.followup_flows 연결)'.

based_on.description: §5 upstream RowRefs the report synthesized from. README 'based_on: { investigate_ref, decide_ref, ground_ref }'. EVERY value is a Postgres step_runs row id, NEVER a file path (legacy '.blazewrit/grounds/**' is PRE-§5). All three keys required here because Report's inputs (README Inputs) are Investigate + Decide + Ground outputs; a report not grounded in those three rows is unsourced. x-m2-validator: each ref must resolve to an existing step_run row of the expected step in this flow.

declared_next_step.$comment: R16 — producer DECLARES but does not free-fill the authoritative next step; orchestrator injects expected_next_step; chain match is M2.
declared_next_step.description: R16 (agent.md L28/L31-33; reviewer criterion 6 CRITICAL). Report's declared successor — for a terminal non-code flow this is typically 'verify' (plan-standalone: Decide→Report→Verify). ADVISORY: the schema carries the declared value; the authoritative value is orchestrator-injected. x-m2-validator: declared_next_step == orchestrator's expected_next_step (chain-divergence check). Mismatch = reviewer FAIL 'R16 chain violation'.

oneOf.$comment: REVIEW — Pass1 critical / Pass2 informational (agent.md L39). Findings-driven; action items required (>=1).
oneOf.title: report_type=review

oneOf.$comment: RETRO — process observations; reviewer criterion 5 requires >=1 action item.
oneOf.title: report_type=retro

oneOf.$comment: EXPLORATION — 'content over form' (agent.md L41). The SOLE flow where action items are NOT required (reviewer criterion 2 'except Exploration'). minItems 0.
oneOf.title: report_type=exploration

oneOf.$comment: SPIKE — feasibility assessment; MUST end with a GO/NO-GO/CONDITIONAL verdict (agent.md L42, reviewer criterion 4). verdict required only on this branch.
oneOf.title: report_type=spike

oneOf.$comment: PLAN_STANDALONE — Decide(Design)→Report→Verify terminal Design doc. task_list (R19) carried VERBATIM/refined from Decide, consumed directly by no downstream code step (terminal); deferral forbidden (reviewer criterion 9). task_list required only on this branch.
oneOf.title: report_type=plan_standalone

oneOf.$comment: COMPOUND — top-level summary aggregating sub-flow results (README L7 'Compound (top-level summary)'; Inputs L14). sub_flow_summaries required only on this branch.
oneOf.title: report_type=compound

ReportSeverity.$comment: Report-specific severity scale — distinct from shared Severity (low|med|high|critical) and SeverityIssue (fatal|high|medium|low). The cleanup FORBIDS collapsing scales; this scale (agent.md L23 'CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / INFO') has an INFO level neither shared scale has, so it is defined locally here, not $ref-ed.
ReportSeverity.description: Finding severity for reports (agent.md L23). INFO = advisory/style (Review Pass2). Lowercased to match harness style; INFO is the report-only extra level.

Finding.description: One severity-tagged finding (README 'findings: [id, statement, severity, evidence_ref]' + agent.md L22-26 impact/verify_probe). evidence_ref present = SHAPE; evidence-traceable / 'claim verified' = irreducible floor closed by M2 (re-read the cited source) + the unverified KEEP-polarity flag. source_tool is the REQUIRED R26 provenance floor on every finding item.

id.description: Stable finding id (e.g. 'F1') for action_item/cross-reference linkage.

statement.description: The finding itself — what was observed/concluded.

evidence_ref.$comment: SHAPE present here; 'evidence_ref 추적 가능' / 'claim verified' is the irreducible/M2 trace, NOT closeable by grammar.
evidence_ref.description: Evidence backing the finding (README 'evidence_ref'; agent.md L24 'file:line reference, data, or reproduction steps'). Either an upstream RowRef (a Ground fact row / Investigate finding row in Postgres) OR an inline read-with-provenance record (file:line the agent read directly). Presence is grammar-enforced; that the evidence ACTUALLY supports the claim and the cited lines exist is the M2 trace + irreducible floor.

oneOf.$comment: Upstream evidence: points at a Postgres row (Ground fact / Investigate finding). §5 RowRef, never a path.
Direct evidence: a file:line the agent read. Uses the SourceManifest $def so M2 can re-read + assert every cited line exists (R36). A read INPUT path is allowed (distinct from §5 output-as-file ban).
Reproduction-steps evidence (agent.md L24 'reproduction steps') when neither a row nor a static file:line — a runnable sequence. Truth = the verify_probe sibling re-execution.

impact.description: Consequence if the finding is ignored (agent.md L25 'Impact'). Optional narrative.

verify_probe.$comment: R20 — re-runnable assertion. Reviewer criterion 10 hard-FAILs on a missing verify_probe; criterion 8 RE-EXECUTES 3 random probes. Truth is the re-execution, not the shape.
verify_probe.description: R20 mechanical probe validating this finding (agent.md L26 'mechanical command/file_exists/grep'; reviewer criterion 10 'all flows — 모든 finding에 verify_probe 명시. 누락 시 FAIL'). SHAPE here; x-m2-validator RE-EXECUTES command and compares to expected_result.

source_tool.$comment: R26 provenance floor — REQUIRED on every finding item.
source_tool.description: The tool/origin that produced this finding (re-read source, ed query, grep, upstream step). Irreducible provenance floor — a finding without source_tool is unsourced and rejected.

unverified.$comment: R13 KEEP polarity — DESIGNED to persist; Verify is the single gate. NO 'no unverified remain' forbid (legacy agent.md L57 / reviewer criterion 3 deleted by the cleanup, per enforcement.md L41 + UnverifiedFlag $def).
unverified.description: R13 flag: true = this finding (e.g. a training-data-based claim, agent.md L47) could not be verified by Report itself and MUST propagate to Verify. POLARITY: never forbidden at this step. Grammar enforces presence; whether unverified:false is honest is the irreducible self-asserted-truth floor (mitigated, not eliminated).

ActionItem.description: Concrete next step (README 'action_items: [description, priority, owner?, followup_flow_ref?]'; agent.md L27 'specific: "Refactor src/auth/token.ts:45-78..."' not vague). followup_flow_ref links a queued follow-up flow ROW (§5).

description.description: Specific imperative action (agent.md L48 — concrete file:line target, not 'improve auth').

priority.description: Action priority. Mirrors the report severity scale's actionable levels (no INFO — an INFO-only item is not an action item).

followup_flow_ref.$comment: §5 — a queued follow-up FLOW row id (Decide.followup_flows linkage, README Activity 3). RowRef, NEVER a path. x-m2-validator: must resolve to an existing flow/work_item row.
followup_flow_ref.description: Optional RowRef to the follow-up flow this action item queues (README 'followup_flow_ref?'). Realizes README Activity 3 'followup_flows 추출 (Decide.followup_flows 연결)'. A Postgres row id, not a file path.

SpikeVerdict.description: Spike feasibility verdict (agent.md L42 'GO / NO-GO / CONDITIONAL'; reviewer criterion 4). Required on the spike branch only. CONDITIONAL carries the condition.

condition.description: Required-when-CONDITIONAL elaboration of what must hold for GO. Optional otherwise.

Task.$comment: R19/R33 task — carried VERBATIM/refined from Decide.task_list for plan-standalone. parallel_marker has an M2 same-file mutual-exclusion contract; counts use CountClaim.
Task.description: One R19 task in a plan-standalone Design synthesis (agent.md L29 'Decide의 task_list verbatim 또는 정제. Spec/Implement이 직접 consume — deferral 금지'; decide.md L58-66 task shape). Terminal: this report IS the consumable plan. deferral ('Spec이 finalize') is a reviewer FAIL (criterion 9). target_files drives the M2 same-file parallel-exclusion check.

description.description: Imperative concrete action (decide.md L60). No deferral language.

inputs.description: Upstream artifact RowRefs this task consumes (decide.md L61 'inputs: [<artifact ref>]'). §5 RowRefs, not paths.

target_files.$comment: File paths the task WRITES — these are the keys the M2 same-file parallel-exclusion check compares across tasks. A WRITE-target path is a plan output target, distinct from §5 storage-of-workflow-output ban.
target_files.description: Files this task will create/modify (decide.md L62 'outputs'). x-m2-validator (with parallel_marker): two tasks sharing any target file MUST both have parallel_marker=false.

depends_on.description: Task ids this depends on (decide.md L63).

acceptance_test.description: How task completion is judged (decide.md L64 '{ type, target, expected }').

verify_probe.description: R20 mechanical probe for this task (decide.md L65, L76 '모든 task에 mechanical execute 가능한 probe').

parallel_marker.$comment: R19/R33 — same-file tasks => parallel_marker=false is an M2 cross-task check, not a keyword.
parallel_marker.description: Whether this task may run in parallel with siblings. x-m2-validator (REQUIRED): tasks sharing a target_file path MUST both be false. Grammar cannot see cross-task overlap.

TaskList.$comment: plan-standalone Design synthesis (R19). task_count is a MEASURED count → CountClaim (R23), never a bare integer.
TaskList.description: R19 task list for plan-standalone (agent.md L29; decide.md L58). Carried verbatim/refined from Decide; this report is the terminal consumable plan. task_count is a CountClaim (R23) — a measured count of tasks, never a bare integer.

task_count.$comment: R23 count-type — measured count of tasks, NOT a bare integer. x-m2-validator: value derivable from the task-source command stdout.
task_count.description: Number of tasks (decide.md L224 '모든 count claim (task count, ...)도 R23 wrapper'). CountClaim, never bare int.

SubFlowSummaries.$comment: Compound top-level aggregation. sub_flow_count is a MEASURED count → CountClaim (R23).
SubFlowSummaries.description: Compound flow top-level summary (README L7). Aggregates each sub-flow's terminal result row. sub_flow_count is a CountClaim (R23). Each entry references the sub-flow's row (§5 RowRef).

flow_ref.$comment: §5 — the sub-flow's Postgres flow/step_run row id, never a path.
flow_ref.description: RowRef to the sub-flow's terminal row whose result is being summarized.

source_tool.$comment: R26 provenance floor on each aggregated item.
source_tool.description: Origin of this sub-flow result (the sub-flow's reporting step / orchestrator).

sub_flow_count.$comment: R23 count-type — measured count of sub-flows aggregated.
sub_flow_count.description: Number of sub-flows aggregated. CountClaim, never bare int.

x-m2-validator-contracts.rule: R20: re-execute verify_probe.command, compare to expected_result
x-m2-validator-contracts.check: RE-EXECUTE each finding's probe (reviewer spot-checks 3 random); mismatch = FAIL. Self-asserted 'it passes' is not truth.

x-m2-validator-contracts.rule: R36/evidence-trace: evidence must actually support the claim and cited lines must exist
x-m2-validator-contracts.check: For kind=source_manifest re-read each file, confirm sha256, assert every cited_line <= line_count and present (non-existent cited line = hallucinated citation). For kind=row_ref assert the row exists and is a Ground/Investigate output of this flow. For kind=reproduction_steps the verify_probe re-execution is the proof. Residual (evidence semantically supports the statement) = irreducible floor.

x-m2-validator-contracts.rule: R26 provenance: the named tool actually produced the finding
x-m2-validator-contracts.check: Partly M2 (re-read/re-execute the named source), partly irreducible self-asserted-truth floor (cross-verification mitigates, does not eliminate).

x-m2-validator-contracts.rule: R13 KEEP polarity: unverified must propagate, never be forbidden
x-m2-validator-contracts.check: NO 'no unverified remain' check (legacy reviewer criterion 3 / agent.md L57 DELETED per enforcement.md L41). Verify is the single gate. Whether unverified:false is honest = irreducible floor.
Each ref resolves to an existing step_runs row of the expected step_name within this flow; not a file path.
When present, resolves to an existing queued flow/work_item row (README Activity 3 Decide.followup_flows connection).
declared_next_step == orchestrator-injected expected_next_step (reviewer criterion 6, CRITICAL). Mismatch = 'R16 chain violation'. No chain-outside-flow_def step claim (criterion 7).

No task description uses deferral language ('Spec이 finalize'/'defer to ...'); each task is concrete and directly consumable (reviewer criterion 9). Deferral = FAIL 'R19 deferral instead of concrete task'.
Two tasks sharing any target_files path MUST both have parallel_marker=false (grammar cannot see cross-task overlap).
Re-hash source.raw_stdout to confirm raw_stdout_sha256, then re-derive value; assert value is derivable. A measured count disconnected from its command is the R23 hallucination.
Report exists ONLY in non-code flows; a code flow producing a report (or failure_origin=report) is rejected by Verify. report_type must match the orchestrator's active flow_type.
